steps.title: Centrifuge 50 mL falcon tubes containing...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 50 mL falcon tubes containing the diatom samples 4000 x g, °C, 10 minutes

steps.title: Discard supernatant EtOH (can be poured from the falcon tube)
steps.instruction: Discard supernatant EtOH (can be poured from the falcon tube).

steps.title: Add 10 mL, fresh EtOH (96%)...
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL, fresh EtOH (96%) denatured to each sample (in falcon tube). Vortex samples to elute pellets again.

steps.title: Prepare each one 2 mL twist-top...
steps.instruction: Prepare each one 2 mL twist-top tube with each one spoon of 2.0 mm (ca. 10) and 1.0 mm (ca. 30) Zirconia beads. Label tubes both on the side and the lid.

steps.title: Add 1 mL, sample to each twist-top tube
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, sample to each twist-top tube. Either use wide-bore tips or cut off the tips. Otherwise tips tend to clock when pipetting the sample.

steps.title: Add 900 µL, TNES and 100...
steps.instruction: Add 900 µL, TNES and 100 µL, ProtK to each sample. Depending on the amount of samples this can be prepared as premix. We usually prepare TNES + Proteinase K in batches for 24 samples. Proteinase K tends to self-digest if the time for samples preparation takes too long.

steps.title: Incubate samples at 55 °C for...
steps.instruction: Incubate samples at 55 °C for 00:20:00 at 1400 rpm, °C, .

steps.title: Store samples at -20 °C until DNA extraction
steps.instruction: Store samples at -20 °C until DNA extraction.

steps.title: Perform multi-habitat diatoms sampling (depending on the protocol)
steps.instruction: Perform multi-habitat diatoms sampling (depending on the protocol).

steps.title: Prepare one sterile 50 mL Falcon tube for each sample
steps.instruction: Prepare one sterile 50 mL Falcon tube for each sample. Label the Falcon tube with EtOH resistant labels (e.g. printed labels).

steps.title: Add 10 mL, diatom sample (e
steps.instruction: Add 10 mL, diatom sample (e.g. scrape sample) to the Falcon tube.

steps.title: Add 40 mL, EtOH (96%) denatured to the Falcon tube
steps.instruction: Add 40 mL, EtOH (96%) denatured to the Falcon tube.

steps.title: Mix sample by inverting the Falcon tube
steps.instruction: Mix sample by inverting the Falcon tube.

steps.title: Store samples under dark conditions at...
steps.instruction: Store samples under dark conditions at Room temperature or at 4 °C until lysis.
